s: In 2001, Juan Moreno suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.920, WHIP 1.210, SO 36, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (TEX -> SDP).
In 2002, Juan Moreno suited up for SDP as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.500, WHIP 2.670, SO 3, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined SDP.
